prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次分别为6130→6866→7833→8754→5539，整体呈先降后升走势：2021–2024年位次数字逐年增大（竞争趋缓），但2025年位次从8754大幅跃升至5539（竞争显著加剧），近4年累计波动幅度约3200名；2025年基准位次约5539名；该校在广西物理类招生计划2021年60人、2022年62人、2023年61人、2024年66人、2025年72人，呈持续扩招态势；2026年计划72人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停，对竞争烈度无额外缓解。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年约第36名，近年稳定在33–38名区间，属于中上层次211，在理工类院校中实力突出；抖音综合热度排名第65位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光度中等；未见明显投档断档或暴跌记录，报考心理较为平稳；第五轮学科评估中，化学工程与技术获评A+，光学工程、控制科学与工程、机械工程获评A-，共4个A-及以上学科；化工、控制、机械等优势学科与招生专业（化工与制药类、机械类、自动化类等）高度对应，对相关专业报考有正向吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类热度较2023年明显降温但仍属推荐，电子信息/通信、电气工程及其自动化2024年均为高热推荐且持续升温，对南理工这类工科强校整体有利；广西2026年普通高考总人数约39.2万，物理类考生估算约26.9万，较2025年（26.0万）增加约3.3%，考生规模扩大使竞争略有加剧；南京理工大学位于江苏南京，属华东地区，对广西考生有一定跨省吸引力但非首选热门；该校在广西物理类招生计划占全国总计划比例约2–3%，属中等偏下水平，非该校主要生源地。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅跃升后回调压力、2026年招生计划持平、广西物理类考生增加约3.3%、专业热度整体偏暖等因素，预计2026年物理类最低位次较2025年（5539名）小幅后移（竞争略缓和），预测最低位次约5639名，区间5139–6139名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were 6130 → 6866 → 7833 → 8754 → 5539, showing an overall trend of first decreasing then increasing: from 2021 to 2024, the rankings increased year by year (competition eased), but in 2025, the ranking jumped significantly from 8754 to 5539 (competition notably intensified), with a cumulative fluctuation range of about 3200 positions over the past 4 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 5539; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category was 60 in 2021, 62 in 2022, 61 in 2023, 66 in 2024, and 72 in 2025, showing a continuous expansion trend; the 2026 plan is 72, unchanged from 2025, pausing the expansion trend, providing no additional relief to competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; ranked approximately 36th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities, with outstanding strength among science and engineering institutions; ranked 65th in comprehensive Douyin popularity, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms; no obvious record of admission cut-off drops or crashes, with relatively stable application psychology; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology received A+, Optical Engineering, Control Science and Engineering, and Mechanical Engineering received A-, totaling 4 disciplines rated A- or above; advantageous disciplines such as Chemical Engineering, Control, and Mechanical Engineering highly correspond to enrollment majors (Chemical and Pharmaceutical Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Automation, etc.), exerting a positive attraction for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The popularity of Computer Science has significantly cooled compared to 2023 but remains recommended; Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation were both highly recommended and continuously heating up in 2024, which is generally beneficial for a strong engineering university like NJUST; the total number of candidates for the 2026 Guangxi general college entrance examination is approximately 392,000, with an estimated 269,000 Physics Category candidates, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (260,000), leading to slightly intensified competition due to the expanded candidate pool; Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in the East China region, which has some cross-provincial appeal for Guangxi candidates but is not a top preferred destination; the enrollment plan for this university in Guangxi Physics Category accounts for about 2–3% of the total national plan, at a relatively low to medium level, and is not a major source of students for the university.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the pressure for correction after the significant ranking jump in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi Physics Category candidates, and the overall warm trend in major popularity, it is expected that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (5539) (competition slightly eases), with a predicted minimum ranking of approximately 5639, and a range of 5139–6139.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum rankings for History Category from 2023 to 2025 were 3647 → 2635 → 2651 respectively. From 2023 to 2024, the ranking moved significantly forward by about 1012 places (competition notably intensified), and from 2024 to 2025 it remained basically stable (only moved back by 16 places). The baseline ranking for 2025 is about 2651. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi was 7 students in 2023, 7 in 2024, and 6 in 2025. In 2026, the plan increases to 8 students, an expansion of about 33.3% compared to 2025, which is a relatively large expansion and significantly alleviates competition intensity.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 36th, and has been stable in the 33–38 range in recent years, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities. Its comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 65th, rated as 'average'. No significant admission cutoff gaps have been observed, and the application psychology is stable. NJUST's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering (Chemical Engineering and Technology A+, Control Science and Engineering A-, Mechanical Engineering A-, etc.), while its liberal arts majors (English, Social Work, Japanese, Law) have no A-class discipline support, making their academic appeal relatively limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Law in 2024 shows differentiated observation, foreign languages generally observed, and the overall popularity of liberal arts majors is neutral to cool. In 2026, the total number of Guangxi general college entrance examination takers is about 392,000, with History Category examinees estimated at about 123,000, an increase of about 3.3% compared to 2025 (119,000), slightly intensifying competition due to the larger examinee pool. Nanjing University of Science and Technology is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, in East China, and its cross-province appeal to Guangxi liberal arts examinees is average. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Guangxi is very small (6–8 students), making it a marginal source region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant 33.3% expansion in History Category in 2026 (from 6 to 8 students), the approximately 3.3% increase in Guangxi History Category examinees, the neutral to cool popularity of liberal arts majors, and the university's unremarkable liberal arts strengths, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will significantly move back (competition eases) compared to 2025 (2651). The predicted minimum ranking is about 3231, with a range of 2746–3716.

If your ranking is significantly better than the lower bound of the range (<2746), you can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 majors like Law and English.
